templates.template:

template.name: batchbeanchunkedopen
template.description: New Batch Bean Chunked Open Method Template

template.name: batchbeanchunkedread
template.description: New Batch Bean Chunked Read Method Template

template.name: batchbeanchunkedprocess
template.description: New Batch Bean Chunked Process Method Template

template.name: batchbeanchunkedwrite
template.description: New Batch Bean Chunked Write Method Template

template.name: batchbeanchunkedupdate
template.description: New Batch Bean Chunked Update Method Template

template.name: batchbeanchunkedclose
template.description: New Batch Bean Chunked Close Method Template

templates.template:
/** *

History : * 
 * 
 * 버전          성명                   일자              변경내용
 * -------       ----------------       -----------       -----------------
 * 1.0.0         개발자(한글이름)       ${date}           신규작성
 * 
 * 
 * @since ${date}
 * @version 1.0.0
 * @author 개발자(한글이름)
 */

template.name: hi2_batch_tasklet
template.description: Hi2-Framework Batch Job Config Tasklet Structure

templates.template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="${encoding}"?> <beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:aop="http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop" xmlns:tx="http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx" xmlns:p="http://www.springframework.org/schema/p" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation=" http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex/spring-batch-ex-2.1.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-3.1.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop/spring-aop-3.1.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx/spring-tx-3.1.xsd">
<job-component xmlns="http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex" id="jobcomp" with-dependon="true"> <base-package name="${bean_package}"> <include name="${bean_name}"/> </base-package> </job-component>
<job id="${job_id}" xmlns="http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex"> <step id="${job_id}-001" parent="parentStep"> <tasklet tm-datasource="${datasource}" ref="${bean_name}"/> </step> </job> </beans>

template.name: hi2_batch_chunked
template.description: Hi2-Framework Batch Job Config Chunked Structure

templates.template:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="${encoding}"?> <beans xmlns="http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans" xmlns:aop="http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop" xmlns:tx="http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx" xmlns:p="http://www.springframework.org/schema/p" xmlns:xsi="http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema-instance" xsi:schemaLocation=" http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex/spring-batch-ex-2.1.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans http://www.springframework.org/schema/beans/spring-beans-3.1.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop http://www.springframework.org/schema/aop/spring-aop-3.1.xsd http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx http://www.springframework.org/schema/tx/spring-tx-3.1.xsd">
<job-component xmlns="http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex" id="jobcomp" with-dependon="true"> <base-package name="${bean_package}"> <include name="${bean_name}"/> </base-package> </job-component>
<job id="${job_id}" xmlns="http://www.es-code.com/schema/batchex"> <step id="${job_id}-001" parent="parentStep"> <tasklet tm-datasource="${datasource}"> <chunk reader="${bean_name}" processor="${bean_name}" writer="${bean_name}"/> </tasklet> </step> </job> </beans>
